description: Using the open food.gdt dataset, compare weekly food expenditure ('food_exp') between high-income and low-income households. Create a dummy variable named 'high_income' that equals 1 if 'income' is strictly greater than the median income, and 0 otherwise. Perform a two-sample t-test to compare 'food_exp' between these two groups. Save the full text output of the t-test to /home/ga/Documents/gretl_output/ttest_results.txt and generate a boxplot comparing the groups, saved as an image to /home/ga/Documents/gretl_output/food_boxplot.png.

metadata.ground_truth_script:
open food.gdt
series high_income = income > median(income)
diff food_exp high_income
